name: revit_find_exterior_walls
description: Identify exterior walls from a candidate set in a floor plan using ray casting and end-join propagation, then return or select the exterior subset.

wall_ids.description: Optional wall element ids to analyze (replaces interactive rectangle pick)

view_id.description: Optional floor plan view id to ensure correct view context

notes: Current implementation requires a floor plan view and rectangle wall selection. MCP use would accept wall_ids and return exterior wall ids instead of calling SetElementIds.
